summary: Comprehensive testing of Cube3 3D Tic-Tac-Toe app completed. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The app is fully functional with 3D board rendering, leaderboard with filters, auth-gated endpoints, and proper navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Auth flow properly uses Bearer tokens from localStorage
Leaderboard filters work as expected with proper API integration
seed_data_creation: Ran /app/backend/seed.py - created 6 demo users with 8-16 games each
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend 3D board renders without errors. Auth flow uses Bearer tokens in localStorage (key: cube3_token). Leaderboard shows seeded users sorted by score. Profile page correctly redirects to / when not authenticated. Test credentials created via mongosh pattern in /app/memory/test_credentials.md.

backend: GET /api/leaderboard - returns 6 seeded users sorted by score
GET /api/auth/me with valid token - returns user data
POST /api/games/record with token - creates game and verifies in history
frontend: Landing page - CUBE3 title, tagline, quickstart cards, stats
Navigation - Play link goes to /lobby, Leaderboard link works
Lobby page - size options (3x3x3, 4x4x4), 5 mode options, Launch match button
Play page (local_2p) - 3D canvas, player panel, controls, turn indicator, move log
New Game button - resets board and history
Leaderboard page - title, filter chips, seeded user rows with names/wins/win rate
Leaderboard filters - size, mode, period filters update results
Play page (4x4x4 ai_hard) - renders 64-cell board, AI player shown
Profile page - redirects to / when not authenticated
